この世の果てで恋を唄う少女YU-NO (Elf Classics Bundle)
description:
YU-NO - The Girl that Chants Love at the Edge of the World  
  
A classic point and click advanture eroge by the long time eroge developer Elf. This was first released back in 1996 on PC98. It soon developed a cult following in Asia. It was then ported to Sega Saturn in winter of 1997 along with newly added voice over and animated opening.   
  
The version here is a Windows re-release version based on the original PC98 version. It is bundled with 2 other older Elf titles. It is in Japanese and without voice over, but 3rd party English patch and Sega Saturn voice addons can be easily found by digging on Google.  
  
Excluding the prologue and epilogue portions, the main part of the game is played via point & click adventure system (Monkey Island, etc).  
  
Keep it in mind that this game does contain elements that could be very offensive to some. Download this at your own risk.  
  
Finally, follow the installation walkthrough included just to avoid possible problems.  
  
[![Image](http://img10.imageshack.us/img10/1848/yunootherworld.jpg)](http://imageshack.us/photo/my-images/10/yunootherworld.jpg/)  
  
I have a very limited monthly bandwidth limit, any extended seeding support will be very appreciated!
